title: Added Local Docs Management UI Smoke
summary: Added a browser smoke test that drives representative Docs Viewer manage-mode workflows through the local /docs/ UI against a temporary fixture repo.
effect: Phase 3 now has UI-level evidence that create, metadata edit, settings save, archive, delete preview/apply, and generated data reloads work through the local Studio app server rather than a separate docs-management HTTP process.
verification: Python compile checks passed for tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_ui.py and tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_workflows.py
tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_workflows.py passed against a temporary fixture repo
tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_ui.py passed against a temporary fixture repo
